LanguageData.ARA_CreepyCrawly.degreeDatas.0.descripti:
{PAWN_nameDef} is a giant arthropod, with multiple limbs, mirrored reflective exoskeleton and twisting segmented body segments that can evoke deep-seated human fear.
You really think they're just a bunch of pretty girls?
LanguageData.ARA_CreepyCrawly.degreeDatas.0.label: Invertebrates
LanguageData.ARA_Queen_Main_Trait.degreeDatas.0.descr:
{PAWN_nameDef} is the only individual in Arachne's Hive that can reproduce Spawns, and the core of the Hive Mind pyramid. She bears the great mission to lead the Arachne Swarm forward.
She has taken control of most of the swarm's autonomy, which makes her underlings Spawns no longer feel sorrow or fear, becoming a powerful flesh army—but if she suffers a mental breakdown, it will spread through the hive network to every individual!
LanguageData.ARA_Queen_Main_Trait.degreeDatas.0.label: I am the swarm.
